originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_I2C false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 true))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 () Bool
  true)
reasoning: When CONFIG_I2C=F, i2c_master_send is not declared (its declaration at L10 is inside #ifdef CONFIG_I2C). The function da7210_init at L14-18 references i2c_master_send at L16, making this a compile error when I2C=F. Alarm from a non-compilable configuration.
